testcase.name: test_tomato_has_multi_priced_layers

failure.message: AssertionError: Need >=2 active layers; have 1 assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len([{'created_at': '2026-05-06T14:11:49.288398+00:00', 'id': '45be2984-6e58-41ec-8abe-741517ac1660', 'last_consumed_at': '2026-05-06T14:12:44.663211+00:00', 'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fifo_fulfill_propagation_iter173.py:79: in test_tomato_has_multi_priced_layers assert len(active) >= 2, f"Need >=2 active layers; have {len(active)}" E AssertionError: Need >=2 active layers; have 1 E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'created_at': '2026-05-06T14:11:49.288398+00:00', 'id': '45be2984-6e58-41ec-8abe-741517ac1660', 'last_consumed_at': '2026-05-06T14:12:44.663211+00:00', 'material_id': 'c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1', ...}])

testcase.name: test_fulfill_drains_oldest_and_propagates

failure.message: AssertionError: no layer with different cost — preflight failed assert None is not None
